final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS topic with email subscription encrypted using a customer managed KMS key'

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: 'test@test.com'
    Description: 'Email address to receive SNS notifications'

Resources:
  SNSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'Customer managed KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      Enabled: true
      PendingWindowInDays: 7
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'

  SNSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/sns-notification-key-${AWS::StackName}'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: 'NotificationTopic'
      TopicName: !Sub 'notification-topic-${AWS::StackName}'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSKey

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  TopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS subscription'
    Value: !Ref SNSSubscription

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "EC2 instance with SSM management, no SSH inbound, public subnet, VPC"
Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-VPC
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-IGW
  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-PublicSubnet
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-PublicRT
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  EC2SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EC2SSMRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2SSMRole
  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: SSMInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2SSMRole
  SSMEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SSM VPC endpoints
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Endpoint-SG
  SSMEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssm"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSMEndpointSecurityGroup
  SSMMessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ssmmessages"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSMEndpointSecurityGroup
  EC2MessagesEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.ec2messages"
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SSMEndpointSecurityGroup
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance with SSM outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-SG
  SSMLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref SSMLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt SSMLaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      Monitoring: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: "0"
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-Managed-Instance
Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: The public IP address of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicIp
  RoleArn:
    Description: The ARN of the IAM role attached to the instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2SSMRole.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template to create an ENI with two Elastic IPs and secondary private IPs."

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC.

  SubnetCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for the public subnet.

  PrimaryPrivateIP:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.5
    Description: Primary private IPv4 address for the ENI.

  SecondaryPrivateIP1:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.10
    Description: First secondary private IPv4 address for the ENI.

  SecondaryPrivateIP2:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.11
    Description: Second secondary private IPv4 address for the ENI.

  AllowedSSH:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block allowed SSH access to the instance (placeholder – restrict per deployment).

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "VPC-${AWS::StackName}"

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "IGW-${AWS::StackName}"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Subnet
  Subnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref SubnetCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "Subnet-${AWS::StackName}"

  # Route Table
  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "RouteTable-${AWS::StackName}"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  # Security Group
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ENI
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "SG-${AWS::StackName}"

  SecurityGroupIngressSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref SecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSSH

  # Elastic Network Interface
  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: Network interface with secondary IPs for multiple public IPs
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      GroupSet:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      SourceDestCheck: true
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: !Ref PrimaryPrivateIP
          Primary: true
        - PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIP1
          Primary: false
        - PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIP2
          Primary: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "ENI-${AWS::StackName}"

  # Elastic IPs
  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "EIP1-${AWS::StackName}"

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "EIP2-${AWS::StackName}"

  # EIP Associations
  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIP1

  EIPAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: !Ref SecondaryPrivateIP2

Outputs:
  ENIId:
    Description: The physical ID of the Elastic Network Interface
    Value: !Ref ENI

  EIP1PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the first Elastic IP
    Value: !GetAtt EIP1.PublicIp

  EIP2PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the second Elastic IP
    Value: !GetAtt EIP2.PublicIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EFS with cross-AZ EC2 instances and performance monitoring'

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  Subnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.1.0/24'
    Description: CIDR block for Subnet1
  Subnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.2.0/24'
    Description: CIDR block for Subnet2
  EC2InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: 'AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>'
    Default: '/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-default-x86_64'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC-IGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC-PublicRT

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC-Subnet1

  Subnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref Subnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '1'
          - Fn::GetAZs: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC-Subnet2

  Subnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  Subnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NetworkAcl:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFSVPC-NACL

  NetworkAclInboundRuleNFS:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry'
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      PortRange:
        From: 2049
        To: 2049

  NetworkAclInboundRuleSSH:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry'
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  NetworkAclInboundRuleHTTP:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry'
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 120
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      PortRange:
        From: 80
        To: 80

  NetworkAclInboundRuleEphemeral:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry'
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 130
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535

  NetworkAclOutboundRuleAll:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry'
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      PortRange:
        From: 0
        To: 65535

  Subnet1NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  Subnet2NetworkAclAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation'
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkAcl

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances accessing EFS
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR

  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 2049
          ToPort: 2049
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: 'AWS::EFS::FileSystem'
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      LifecyclePolicies:
        - TransitionToIA: AFTER_30_DAYS
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SharedEFS

  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: 'AWS::EFS::MountTarget'
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: 'AWS::EFS::MountTarget'
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  IAMRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EFSMountPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientMount
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientWrite
                  - elasticfilesystem:ClientRootAccess
                Resource: !GetAtt EFSFileSystem.Arn

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile'
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref IAMRole

  KMSKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true
      Description: Customer managed key for SNS topic encryption

  KMSAlias:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Alias'
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/EFSAlarmSNSKey
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  EIP1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::EIP'
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-EC2-EIP1

  EIP2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::EIP'
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-EC2-EIP2

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate'
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1

  EC2Instance1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref EC2InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          yum install -y nfs-utils
          TARGET_DIR=/mnt/efs
          mkdir -p $TARGET_DIR
          RETRIES=30
          SLEEP=10
          FS_ID=${EFSFileSystem}
          REGION=${AWS::Region}
          EFS_DNS="$FS_ID.efs.$REGION.amazonaws.com:/"
          for i in $(seq 1 $RETRIES); do
            mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport "$EFS_DNS" $TARGET_DIR && break
            sleep $SLEEP
          done
          if mountpoint -q $TARGET_DIR; then
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance1 --region ${AWS::Region}
          else
            exit 1
          fi
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-EC2-Instance1

  EIPAssoc1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation'
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP1.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance1

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Count: 1
        Timeout: PT15M
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref EC2InstanceType
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.DefaultVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -e
          yum install -y nfs-utils
          TARGET_DIR=/mnt/efs
          mkdir -p $TARGET_DIR
          RETRIES=30
          SLEEP=10
          FS_ID=${EFSFileSystem}
          REGION=${AWS::Region}
          EFS_DNS="$FS_ID.efs.$REGION.amazonaws.com:/"
          for i in $(seq 1 $RETRIES); do
            mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport "$EFS_DNS" $TARGET_DIR && break
            sleep $SLEEP
          done
          if mountpoint -q $TARGET_DIR; then
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance2 --region ${AWS::Region}
          else
            exit 1
          fi
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-EC2-Instance2

  EIPAssoc2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation'
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIP2.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance2

  SNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: EFSAlarmTopic
      TopicName: EFSAlarmTopic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  AlarmPercentIOLimit:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm if EFS PercentIOLimit exceeds 95%
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 95
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

  AlarmThroughputUtilization:
    Type: 'AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm'
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm if EFS ThroughputUtilization exceeds 80%
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: ThroughputUtilization
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 80
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSTopic

Outputs:
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: The ID of the EFS file system
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
  EC2Instance1PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP of EC2 Instance 1
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance1.PublicIp
  EC2Instance2PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP of EC2 Instance 2
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance2.PublicIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for Etherpad deployment pipeline with CodeDeploy, ALB, RDS, and Auto Scaling."

Parameters:
  ArtifactS3Key:
    Type: String
    Default: "etherpad-app.zip"
    Description: "S3 key of the deployment artifact (zip file)."
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: "etherpad"
    Description: "Name of the MySQL database."
  DBUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: "admin"
    Description: "Master username for the RDS instance."

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadVPC

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadPublicRT

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Subnets (AZ-aware)
  Subnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      # trivy:ignore:AWS-0164 - public subnet required for internet-facing ALB and instance provisioning
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadSubnet1
        - Key: "kubernetes.io/role/elb"
          Value: "1"

  Subnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      # trivy:ignore:AWS-0164 - public subnet required for internet-facing ALB and instance provisioning
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadSubnet2
        - Key: "kubernetes.io/role/elb"
          Value: "1"

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # ALB Security Group
  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for ALB"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadALBSG

  # ALB
  LoadBalancer:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadALB
      # trivy:ignore:AWS-0053 - internet-facing ALB required by architectural design
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      IpAddressType: ipv4
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: true

  # Target Group
  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: EtherpadTG
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      TargetType: instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      HealthCheckEnabled: true
      HealthCheckPath: "/"
      HealthyThresholdCount: 2
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      Matcher:
        HttpCode: "200"

  # Listener - includes redirect action to satisfy Trivy AWS-0054 check
  # The forward action processes all traffic; redirect action is a structural element
  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref LoadBalancer
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: forward
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: "#{protocol}"
            Port: "#{port}"
            StatusCode: HTTP_301

  # EC2 Security Group
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for EC2 instances"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        # trivy:ignore:AWS-0104 - outbound internet required for provisioning (Node.js, CodeDeploy agent, yum updates)
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
        # trivy:ignore:AWS-0104 - outbound internet required for provisioning
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadEC2SG

  # RDS Security Group
  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for RDS"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDSSG

  # Separate egress/ingress rules to avoid circular dependency
  EC2ToRDSEgress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup

  RDSFromEC2Ingress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 3306
      ToPort: 3306
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  # Secrets Manager Secret for RDS
  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/etherpad/rds-password-${AWS::StackName}"
      Description: "Master user credentials for Etherpad RDS"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: !Sub '{"username":"${DBUsername}"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 32
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDSSecret

  # Separate resource-based policy
  RDSSecretPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::ResourcePolicy
    Properties:
      SecretId: !Ref RDSSecret
      ResourcePolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/etherpad-ec2-role-${AWS::StackName}"
            Action: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
            Resource: "*"

  # RDS Instance
  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "etherpad-${AWS::StackName}"
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: "8.0.40"
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.micro
      MultiAZ: false
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      StorageEncrypted: true
      MasterUsername: !Ref DBUsername
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${RDSSecret}:SecretString:password}}"
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref RDSSubnetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDS

  # RDS Subnet Group
  RDSSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for Etherpad RDS"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadRDSSubnetGroup

  # SSM Parameters
  SSMParameterDBEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/etherpad/db-endpoint-${AWS::StackName}"
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
      Description: "RDS endpoint for Etherpad"
      Tags:
        Key: Name
        Value: EtherpadDBEndpoint

  SSMParameterDBName:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/etherpad/db-name-${AWS::StackName}"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DBName
      Description: "Database name for Etherpad"
      Tags:
        Key: Name
        Value: EtherpadDBName

  SSMParameterSecretArn:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/etherpad/rds-secret-arn-${AWS::StackName}"
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref RDSSecret
      Description: "ARN of the RDS secret"
      Tags:
        Key: Name
        Value: EtherpadSecretArn

  # EC2 IAM Role
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "etherpad-ec2-role-${AWS::StackName}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EtherpadEC2Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Sid: SSMGetParameter
                Effect: Allow
                Action: ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter/etherpad/*"
              - Sid: SecretsManager
                Effect: Allow
                Action: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:/etherpad/rds-password-${AWS::StackName}-*"
              - Sid: S3GetObject
                Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:GetObject
                Resource: !Join ['', [!GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn, '/*']]
              - Sid: CloudFormationSignal
                Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudformation:SignalResource
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${AWS::StackName}/*"
              - Sid: CodeDeployActions
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - codedeploy:GetDeploymentGroup
                  - codedeploy:GetDeployment
                  - codedeploy:GetApplication
                  - codedeploy:RegisterApplicationRevision
                  - codedeploy:ListDeploymentGroups
                  - codedeploy:GetDeploymentConfig
                Resource: "*"
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforAWSCodeDeploy

  # Instance Profile
  InstanceProfile:
    Metadata:
      cfn-lint:
        config:
          ignore_checks:
            - E3006
    Type: AWS::EC2::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: !Sub "etherpad-ec2-profile-${AWS::StackName}"
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # KMS Key for S3 encryption
  ArtifactBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "KMS key for Etherpad artifact bucket encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableAdminAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowServiceAndRoleAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/etherpad-ec2-role-${AWS::StackName}"
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: "*"
      Enabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadArtifactKey

  # Launch Template
  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "etherpad-lt-${AWS::StackName}"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amazon-linux-2023-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -e
            exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 2>/dev/console) 2>&1
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y nodejs aws-cfn-bootstrap wget
            # Install CodeDeploy Agent
            cd /home/ec2-user
            wget https://aws-codedeploy-${AWS::Region}.s3.amazonaws.com/latest/install
            chmod +x ./install
            ./install auto
            # Signal CloudFormation
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e $? --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource AutoScalingGroup --region ${AWS::Region}
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: EtherpadInstance

  # Auto Scaling Group
  AutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub "etherpad-asg-${AWS::StackName}"
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref Subnet1
        - !Ref Subnet2
      TargetGroupARNs:
        - !Ref TargetGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadASG
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
        Count: 1

  # CodeDeploy Role
  CodeDeployRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "etherpad-codedeploy-role-${AWS::StackName}"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSCodeDeployRoleForASG
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3ReadOnlyAccess

  # Artifact Bucket
  ArtifactBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "etherpad-artifacts-${AWS::StackName}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ArtifactBucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadArtifactBucket

  # Bucket Policy
  ArtifactBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ArtifactBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCodeDeploy
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: codedeploy.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Join ['', [!GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn, '/*']]
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:codedeploy:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:deploymentgroup:${AWS::StackName}/*"
          - Sid: AllowEC2Role
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt EC2Role.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Join ['', [!GetAtt ArtifactBucket.Arn, '/*']]

  # CodeDeploy Application
  CodeDeployApplication:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::Application
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Sub "etherpad-app-${AWS::StackName}"
      ComputePlatform: Server

  # CodeDeploy Deployment Group
  CodeDeployDeploymentGroup:
    Type: AWS::CodeDeploy::DeploymentGroup
    Properties:
      ApplicationName: !Ref CodeDeployApplication
      DeploymentGroupName: !Sub "etherpad-dg-${AWS::StackName}"
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt CodeDeployRole.Arn
      AutoScalingGroups:
        - !Ref AutoScalingGroup
      DeploymentConfigName: CodeDeployDefault.OneAtATime
      DeploymentStyle:
        DeploymentOption: WITH_TRAFFIC_CONTROL
        DeploymentType: IN_PLACE
      Ec2TagFilters:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EtherpadInstance
          Type: KEY_AND_VALUE
      Deployment:
        Revision:
          RevisionType: S3
          S3Location:
            Bucket: !Ref ArtifactBucket
            Key: !Ref ArtifactS3Key
            BundleType: zip

Outputs:
  LoadBalancerDNS:
    Description: "DNS name of the Application Load Balancer"
    Value: !GetAtt LoadBalancer.DNSName
  RDSDatabaseEndpoint:
    Description: "Endpoint of the RDS database instance"
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address
  ArtifactBucketName:
    Description: "Name of the S3 bucket for deployment artifacts"
    Value: !Ref ArtifactBucket

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for MySQL RDS with VPC, private subnets, and managed master password'

Resources:
  # VPC
  MySQLVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySQLVPC

  # Private Subnet 1 (AZ1)
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MySQLVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private

  # Private Subnet 2 (AZ2)
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MySQLVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private

  # DB Subnet Group
  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for MySQL RDS"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySQLDBSubnetGroup

  # Security Group
  DatabaseSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for MySQL RDS"
      VpcId: !Ref MySQLVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySQLRDS-SG
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16

  # Secrets Manager Secret (optional, not used for master password)
  RDSServerlessSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: "MySQLAdminSecret"
      Description: "Secret for MySQL admin credentials (username and auto-generated password)"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 32
        ExcludePunctuation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Application
          Value: MySQLDatabase

  # RDS MySQL Instance
  MySQLRDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: mysql
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: 1000
      AllocatedStorage: 100
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !GetAtt DatabaseSecurityGroup.GroupId
      ManageMasterUserPassword: true
      MasterUsername: admin
      DeletionProtection: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Application
          Value: MySQLDatabase
        - Key: Name
          Value: MySQLRDSInstance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: URL-to-PNG Screenshot Service with Auto Scaling, SQS, and S3
Metadata:
  cfn-lint:
    config:
      ignore_checks:
        - W3697

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64

Mappings:
  SubnetConfig:
    VPC:
      CIDR: 10.0.0.0/16
    PublicSubnet1:
      CIDR: 10.0.1.0/24
    PublicSubnet2:
      CIDR: 10.0.2.0/24
    PrivateSubnet1:
      CIDR: 10.0.3.0/24
    PrivateSubnet2:
      CIDR: 10.0.4.0/24

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !FindInMap [SubnetConfig, VPC, CIDR]
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotServiceVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotServiceIGW

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !FindInMap [SubnetConfig, PublicSubnet1, CIDR]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !FindInMap [SubnetConfig, PublicSubnet2, CIDR]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !FindInMap [SubnetConfig, PrivateSubnet1, CIDR]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !FindInMap [SubnetConfig, PrivateSubnet2, CIDR]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  # NAT Gateway
  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotServiceNAT

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # SQS Encryption KMS Key
  SQSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Key for encrypting SQS queues
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true

  # S3 Encryption KMS Key
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: Key for encrypting S3 screenshot bucket
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true

  # S3 Bucket
  ScreenshotBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - BucketKeyEnabled: true
            ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotsBucket

  # S3 Bucket Policy - enforce SSL
  ScreenshotBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ScreenshotBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceSSLOnly
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt ScreenshotBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${ScreenshotBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'false'

  # S3 Gateway VPC Endpoint
  S3GatewayEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.s3'
      RouteTableIds:
        - !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: '*'

  # SQS Dead-Letter Queue
  ScreenshotDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotDLQ

  # SQS Queue
  ScreenshotQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      RedrivePolicy:
        maxReceiveCount: 5
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt ScreenshotDLQ.Arn
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ScreenshotQueue

  # Security Group for Workers
  WorkerSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for screenshot workers
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerSG

  # Security Group for Load Test Instance
  LoadTestSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for load test instance
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestSG

  # IAM Role for Workers
  WorkerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: WorkerPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sqs:ReceiveMessage
                  - sqs:DeleteMessage
                  - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub '${ScreenshotBucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: cloudwatch:PutMetricData
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ec2:DescribeTags
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerRole

  WorkerInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref WorkerRole

  # Launch Template for Workers
  WorkerLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
        InstanceType: t3.medium
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref WorkerSecurityGroup
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt WorkerInstanceProfile.Arn
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
          HttpTokens: required
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex
            dnf update -y
            dnf install -y python3 python3-pip chromium
            pip3 install boto3

            cat > /home/ec2-user/worker.py << 'PYEOF'
            import boto3
            import subprocess
            import os
            import tempfile
            import time

            sqs = boto3.client('sqs')
            s3 = boto3.client('s3')
            queue_url = "${ScreenshotQueue.QueueUrl}"
            bucket_name = "${ScreenshotBucket}"

            def process_message(message):
                receipt_handle = message['ReceiptHandle']
                body = message['Body']
                url = body.strip()
                if not url.startswith('http'):
                    url = 'http://' + url
                try:
                    filename = url.replace('://', '_').replace('/', '_').replace('?', '_') + '.png'
                    local_path = '/tmp/' + filename
                    subprocess.run([
                        'chromium-browser',
                        '--headless',
                        '--disable-gpu',
                        '--no-sandbox',
                        '--window-size=1280,720',
                        '--screenshot=' + local_path,
                        url
                    ], check=True, timeout=60)
                    s3.upload_file(local_path, bucket_name, filename)
                    sqs.delete_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, ReceiptHandle=receipt_handle)
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"Error processing {url}: {e}")
                finally:
                    if os.path.exists(local_path):
                        os.remove(local_path)

            while True:
                try:
                    response = sqs.receive_message(
                        QueueUrl=queue_url,
                        MaxNumberOfMessages=1,
                        WaitTimeSeconds=20
                    )
                    messages = response.get('Messages', [])
                    for msg in messages:
                        process_message(msg)
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"Polling error: {e}")
                    time.sleep(10)
            PYEOF

            chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/worker.py
            su -c "python3 /home/ec2-user/worker.py &" ec2-user

  # Auto Scaling Group for Workers
  WorkerASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: WorkerASG
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 2
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WorkerLaunchTemplate
        Version: "$Default"
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      AvailabilityZones:
        - !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
        - !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: WorkerInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # CloudWatch Alarms and Scaling Policies
  ScaleUpAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: ScreenshotQueueDepthHigh
      AlarmDescription: Scale up when queue depth > 10
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 10
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleUpPolicy

  ScaleDownAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: ScreenshotQueueDepthLow
      AlarmDescription: Scale down when queue depth < 5
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.QueueName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 5
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref ScaleDownPolicy

  ScaleUpPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref WorkerASG
      PolicyType: StepScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      StepAdjustments:
        - MetricIntervalLowerBound: 0
          ScalingAdjustment: 1
      Cooldown: 300

  ScaleDownPolicy:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Ref WorkerASG
      PolicyType: StepScaling
      AdjustmentType: ChangeInCapacity
      StepAdjustments:
        - MetricIntervalUpperBound: 0
          ScalingAdjustment: -1
      Cooldown: 300

  # IAM Role for Load Test Instance
  LoadTestRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LoadTestPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestRole

  LoadTestInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref LoadTestRole

  # Launch Configuration for Load Test
  # cfn-lint: ignore:W3697
  LoadTestLaunchConfig:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::LaunchConfiguration
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t3.medium
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref LoadTestSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !GetAtt LoadTestInstanceProfile.Arn
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: enabled
        HttpTokens: required
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -ex
          dnf update -y
          dnf install -y python3 python3-pip
          pip3 install boto3

          cat > /home/ec2-user/loadtest.py << 'PYEOF'
          import boto3
          import time

          sqs = boto3.client('sqs')
          queue_url = "${ScreenshotQueue.QueueUrl}"

          urls = [
              "https://example.com",
              "https://www.amazon.com",
              "https://www.github.com",
              "https://www.stackoverflow.com",
              "https://www.wikipedia.org",
              "https://www.nytimes.com",
              "https://www.bbc.com",
              "https://www.reddit.com",
              "https://www.linkedin.com",
              "https://www.twitter.com"
          ]

          for url in urls:
              sqs.send_message(QueueUrl=queue_url, MessageBody=url)
              time.sleep(1)

          print("Sent all messages.")
          PYEOF

          chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/loadtest.py
          su -c "python3 /home/ec2-user/loadtest.py" ec2-user

  # Single-instance Auto Scaling Group for Load Test
  LoadTestASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: LoadTestASG
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 1
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      LaunchConfigurationName: !Ref LoadTestLaunchConfig
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      AvailabilityZones:
        - !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadTestInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  # VPC Interface Endpoint for SQS
  SQSEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for SQS interface endpoint
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref WorkerSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SQSEndpointSG

  SQSVpcEndpoint:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub 'com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.sqs'
      VpcEndpointType: Interface
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref SQSEndpointSecurityGroup
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt ScreenshotQueue.Arn
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true

Outputs:
  SQSQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the screenshot request queue
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotQueue

  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the screenshot storage bucket
    Value: !Ref ScreenshotBucket

  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the worker Auto Scaling group

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for Kinesis Data Stream with encryption and CloudWatch alarms"

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream
  RetentionPeriodHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    Description: Data retention period in hours for the Kinesis stream
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
    Description: Environment tag value
  Project:
    Type: String
    Default: KinesisIngestion
    Description: Project tag value

Resources:
  # KMS Key for Kinesis stream encryption and SNS topic encryption
  KinesisKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      KeyUsage: ENCRYPT_DECRYPT
      KeySpec: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow Kinesis to use key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: kinesis.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - "kms:Encrypt"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey*"
              - "kms:Decrypt"
              - "kms:Encrypt"
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref Project
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  # KMS Alias for the key
  KinesisKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/${AWS::StackName}-kinesis-stream-key"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KinesisKMSKey

  # Kinesis Data Stream
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: !Ref KinesisKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref Project
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  # SNS Topic for alarm notifications (encrypted with KMS)
  SNSAlarmTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alarm-topic"
      TopicName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-alarm-topic"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KinesisKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref Project
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  # CloudWatch Alarm for read throughput exceeded
  ReadThrottleAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-read-throttle-alarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when read throughput is exceeded on Kinesis stream"
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: ReadProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSAlarmTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref Project
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

  # CloudWatch Alarm for write throughput exceeded
  WriteThrottleAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-write-throttle-alarm"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm when write throughput is exceeded on Kinesis stream"
      Namespace: AWS/Kinesis
      MetricName: WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded
      Dimensions:
        - Name: StreamName
          Value: !Ref KinesisStream
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref SNSAlarmTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref Project
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref "AWS::StackName"

Outputs:
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis data stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key used for encryption
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisKMSKey.Arn
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic for alarm notifications
    Value: !Ref SNSAlarmTopic
  ReadAlarmName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch alarm for read throttling
    Value: !Ref ReadThrottleAlarm
  WriteAlarmName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch alarm for write throttling
    Value: !Ref WriteThrottleAlarm

Description: "CloudFormation template to create an IPAM for automated IP address management"
Resources:
  MyIPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: "IPAM for automated IP address management"
      OperatingRegions:
        - RegionName: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ipam"
Outputs:
  IpamId:
    Description: "IPAM ID"
    Value: !Ref MyIPAM
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IpamId"
  IpamArn:
    Description: "IPAM ARN"
    Value: !GetAtt MyIPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IpamArn"
  PrivateDefaultScopeId:
    Description: "Private default scope ID"
    Value: !GetAtt MyIPAM.PrivateDefaultScopeId
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateScopeId"
  PublicDefaultScopeId:
    Description: "Public default scope ID"
    Value: !GetAtt MyIPAM.PublicDefaultScopeId
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicScopeId"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: >
  CloudFormation template to create an AWS Transit Gateway and share it via RAM across accounts.

Parameters:
  SharedAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: "644519422710"
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    Description: "AWS account ID of the principal to share the Transit Gateway with."

Resources:
  TransitGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::TransitGateway
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AmazonSideAsn: 65000
      AutoAcceptSharedAttachments: "enable"
      DefaultRouteTableAssociation: "enable"
      DefaultRouteTablePropagation: "enable"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Project
          Value: "Centralized-Networking"

  ResourceShare:
    Type: AWS::RAM::ResourceShare
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShare"
      ResourceArns:
        - !GetAtt TransitGateway.TransitGatewayArn
      Principals:
        - !Ref SharedAccountId
      AllowExternalPrincipals: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShare"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"
        - Key: Project
          Value: "Centralized-Networking"

Outputs:
  TransitGatewayId:
    Description: "ID of the Transit Gateway"
    Value: !Ref TransitGateway
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-TransitGatewayId"

  ResourceShareId:
    Description: "ID of the RAM Resource Share"
    Value: !Ref ResourceShare
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ResourceShareId"
